arguments.final_answer:
Added --stats flag to filetool:
1. src/main.rs — Added FileStats struct, compute_stats() function (counts lines, words, chars, bytes), print_stats() formatter. Main parses --stats flag, separates file args from flags. Uses fs::read + from_utf8_lossy for proper byte count.
2. tests/test_stats.rs — 2 integration tests: --stats output verification (line/word/byte counts), normal output (no stats headers).
3. Cargo.toml — added tempfile dev dependency.
All tests pass.
